flashcards.back: A self-executing program stored on a blockchain that automatically executes the terms of an agreement when predetermined conditions are met.

flashcards.front: Name three key properties of smart contracts.
flashcards.back: Autonomous, Deterministic, Immutable, Transparent, Trustless (any three).
The challenge of securely and reliably providing off-chain data to on-chain smart contracts, as blockchains are isolated networks.

flashcards.front: Which programming language is most commonly associated with writing Ethereum smart contracts?
What is the main advantage of using a smart contract over a traditional legal contract for a simple agreement?
flashcards.back: It eliminates the need for a trusted third-party intermediary, reducing cost and time while automating execution.
